mission.title: n8n: Unable to add external NPM packages
mission.description: Unable to add external NPM packages. This issue affects 8+ users.

steps.title: Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review n8n configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n
kubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n
```
### Bug Description

Then trying to add a custom NPM package to a Docker image, I get the below error. It was working on v2.2.4, but is broken on v.2.2.5.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Unable to add external NPM packages
steps.description:
## Summary
- Added call to `module.constructor._initPaths()` in task runner to initialize module paths from `NODE_PATH` environment variable

## Related tickets and issues
- Fixes #24191

## Review / Merge checklist

## Details

The issue was that while `NODE_PATH` environment variable was passed
```yaml
FROM n8nio/n8n:2.2.5
USER root
RUN npm install -g word-extractor
USER node
```

steps.title: Confirm Unable to add external NPM packages is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## Summary
- Added call to `module.constructor._initPaths()` in task runner to initialize module paths from `NODE_PATH` environment variable

## Related tickets and issues
- Fixes #24191

## Review / Merge checklist

## Details

The issue was that while `NODE_PATH` environment variable was passed to the task runner process (since commit 906770a), Node.js doesn't automatically pick up changes to
codeSnippets:
FROM n8nio/n8n:2.2.5
USER root
RUN npm install -g word-extractor
USER node

services:
  n8n:
    build: .
    environment:
      - NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL=*
    volumes:
      - ./data:/home/node/.n8n
    ports:
      - 5678:5678

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with n8n installed or the issue environment reproducible.
